description: Multi-turn walkthrough of the Coorg intake. Ends with confirmation -> extraction.

turns: I want to plan a Coorg trip.
From Bengaluru, 3 nights from {today+30d} to {today+33d}. Couple trip, just the two of us.
Relaxed vibe. Budget around Rs 8000 per night, so Rs 24000 total excluding flights.
No dietary preferences, we want a resort with a pool and wifi, nothing to avoid.
Yes that summary is correct, please extract and proceed.
